chapter_title.en: The Reward for the Ziyārah of Ĥusain (a.s.) on the Fifteenth of Sha’bān

text: قَالَ الْبَاقِرُ (ع) زَائِرُ الْحُسَيْنِ (ع) فِي النِّصْفِ مِنْ شَعْبَانَ يُغْفَرُ لَهُ ذُنُوبُهُ وَ لَنْ يُكْتَبَ عَلَيْهِ سَيِّئَةٌ فِي سَنَةٍ حَتَّى يَحُولَ عَلَيْهِ الْحَوْلُ فَإِنْ زَارَ فِي السَّنَةِ الْمُقْبِلَةِ غَفَرَ اللَّهُ لَهُ ذُنُوبَهُ

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 5. My father narrated to me through his Isnād from Dāwūd ibn Kuthayr Al-Raqqi, who said: Imam Bāqir (a.s.) said: The sins of those who go to the Ziyārah of Ḥusain (a.s.) on the fifteenth of Sha’bān will be forgiven and no bad deeds will be registered for them in that year. And if they go to the Ziyārah of Ḥusain (a.s.) again (on the fifteenth of Sha’bān of) the next year, Allāh will forgive all of their sins.
